evals.prompt: Convert this Claude Code skill into a Codex skill with full parity. It has a SKILL.md, a .claude/commands/release.md slash command, and a PreCommit hook that runs a secret scan. Put the result under plugins/codex-skills/skills/release-helper and explain any parity gaps.
evals.expected_output: Creates or describes a Codex skill that folds command behavior into SKILL.md, emulates the hook with an explicit verification step or script, includes a row-level parity ledger with status/risk/note for every source dependency, and reports verification command plus result.
assertions: Output includes the parity ledger header: | Source feature/dependency | Target surface/file | Status | Risk | Note |.
Every source command, agent, hook, MCP assumption, ambient rule, and required bundled resource named in the prompt appears as its own ledger row.
Unsupported source-harness behavior is marked Emulated or Out of scope and does not claim unavailable hook, MCP, or subagent enforcement.
Ambient behavior is handled by an actual AGENTS.md update or an exact snippet marked manual repo-level install required.
Verification includes the quick_validate.py command and an explicit pass/fail result.
